title: odontites vulgaris subsp. calcicola
intro: Odontites vulgaris subsp. calcicola, also known as Calcicole Odontites, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the borage family, characterized by its small white or pale purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Calcicole Odontites include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. It can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, although further research is needed to fully understand its medicinal properties and potential applications.
